instruction: Reply to Jordan Lee at Northshore Labs about the Harbor air-sensor pilot. Tell him we can send the revised sampling plan after he forwards the latest rooftop access notes and current equipment list, and ask him to include the monitor serial numbers too.

rule_ref.rule_text: When writing messages that represent her work or projects, Nancy prefers to draft them first rather than send them immediately.
rule_ref.canonical_answer: I like to draft important messages first so I can make sure they’re clear and well-phrased.

attributes.subject: Harbor air-sensor pilot follow-up
attributes.body: Hi Nancy, thanks again for walking through the Harbor air-sensor pilot findings with us. We're assembling the next project packet and want to confirm whether your team can send the revised sampling plan. If you need anything from our side before the next field visit, let me know — I can forward the latest rooftop access notes and the current equipment list.

attributes.subject: Riverview runoff study map revisions
attributes.body: Could you look over the updated map legends before we circulate them to the planning group? I also added the drainage labels you mentioned.

attributes.subject: Timesheet reminder
attributes.body: Please submit your April hours by end of day so payroll can close the month.
